scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @sandbox/shared build && concurrently -n shared,server,web -c gray,magenta,cyan "pnpm --filter @sandbox/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @sandbox/ws-server dev" "pnpm --filter @sandbox/web dev"
scripts.piston:up: pnpm --filter @sandbox/shared build && docker compose -f docker/piston/compose.yml up -d && node docker/piston/install-runtimes.mjs
